title: Village Employment
description: Ever wanted to "work" in a village, or just dress up like a Villager? Well, now you can!
body:
Ever wanted to work in a village, and still fit right in? Well, now you can! Villages everywhere are now hiring, thanks to my new mod,...

 

This mod is much smaller than most of my other mods, but I still put a lot of thought into it. I've added costumes for every profession known to villager-kind, including the Wandering Trader. Some of the costumes (and their special traits) will be listed below:

 

Armorer

 

Butcher

 

Cartographer

 

Cleric

 

Farmer

 

Fisherman

 

 

Fletcher

 

Librarian

 

Shepherd

 

Weaponsmith

 

Standalone Aprons (Left to right: Leatherworker, Mason, and Toolsmith)

 

Wandering Trader

Makes you invisible during night or when attacked (Note: only works when the traderCostumeInvisibility gamerule is set to true)

 

Iron Golem

This armor is craftable, and it makes the player much stronger, but the weight of the armor also slows the player down.

 

Nitwit

 

Testificate

These outfits are craftable, but they are strictly cosmetic.

 

Vindicator

WIP

Allows you to ride Ravagers, but they'll still attack you in Survival, so I'd suggest doing it in Creative. Other Illagers will also still attack you, but I will try and get this fixed.

 

Evoker

WIP

Same effects as the Vindicator
Press V to summon a circle of Evoker Fangs around you. Press V while sneaking to summon a Vex. Like the Ravager, the Vexes will still attack you in Survival Mode.

 

Pillager

WIP

Same effects as the Vindicator

If you're killed while wearing the Pillager Captain Flag, you'll give a Bad Omen to the mob or player that killed you.

 

Witch

Protects you from some negative potion effects and automatically applies certain potion effects under certain circumstances

 

I should also point out that none of these costumes (except for the Iron Golem armor and Testificate outfits) can be crafted. The Wandering Trader costume is gotten from killing a Wandering Trader, and the other costumes can be found in Village chests. Oh, and all of these costumes (except for the Wandering Trader, Iron Golem, Nitwit, and Testificate outfits) give the player other Villager-like traits. Specifically, when a villager gets Regeneration I from trading, the player (if wearing a full costume set) will also get it!


In addition to these costumes, I also added some other things.

 

Grass Path Slab

This block can help make Villages more accessible for people who hate Auto-Jump. However, because of the unique 7-pixel-tall model I used, this block is kind of buggy, and it doesn't function exactly like a normal slab. As for obtaining this block, you craft it with 3 Grass Path blocks placed horizontally. Because Grass Path blocks can't be obtained in Survival, even with Silk Touch, I've added a crafting recipe for Grass Path blocks.

 

Grunge and Sponge

This unique tool can be used to quickly alter vanilla decorative stone blocks to their mossy variants, and vice versa.

 

Orb of Dominance Staff
This staff, when right-clicked, can summon Illager minions to fight for you. You can get rid of these minions by hitting them with the staff.

 

Older versions of the mod can be found on Curseforge.
